evidence.claim: Expertise in scikit-learn, PyTorch, Milvus, Deep Learning, Semantic Search, Weaviate, RAG, Weights & Biases, BM25, Python, QLoRA, Reinforcement Learning, Object Detection, and Webpack.
evidence.source_text: Skills: scikit-learn (advanced, 32mo, 40 endorsements); PyTorch (expert, 36mo, 5 endorsements); Milvus (advanced, 58mo, 1 endorsements); Deep Learning (expert, 73mo, 55 endorsements); Semantic Search (advanced, 37mo, 31 endorsements); Weaviate (expert, 51mo, 47 endorsements); Object Detection (intermediate, 32mo, 3 endorsements); RAG (expert, 46mo, 55 endorsements); Weights & Biases (advanced, 36mo, 21 endorsements); BM25 (advanced, 41mo, 1 endorsements); Webpack (beginner, 7mo, 14 endorsements); Python (expert, 60mo, 25 endorsements); QLoRA (expert, 76mo, 2 endorsements); Reinforcement Learning (intermediate, 21mo, 10 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% by evolving ranking layer from hand-tuned to learning-to-rank model.
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months... Final model improved revenue-per-search by 12%.

evidence.claim: Reduced average ticket resolution time by 31% via RAG-based chatbot deployment.
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets and business metrics.
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion) — that work was as important as the modeling itself.

evidence.claim: Owns the evaluation framework for RAG-based features.
evidence.source_text: Recently, I shipped our first RAG-based feature this year and now own the eval framework for it.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes practical system reliability and data quality over pure modeling.
evidence.source_text: Most of the work was infrastructure and data quality — the modeling part was almost the easy bit.

evidence.claim: Learns primarily through shipping real systems and production load testing.
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Experience with offline-online correlation analysis for ranking models.
evidence.source_text: Owned the offline-online correlation analysis that determined which offline metrics actually predicted A/B test outcomes.
